commands.name: /help
commands.description: Show all available commands and usage

commands.name: /reset
commands.description: Clear conversation history and start a fresh session

commands.name: /stop
commands.description: Force-cancel the current operation and its spawned background tasks

commands.name: /summarize
commands.description: Summarize current context into active memory

commands.name: /recommend
commands.description: Detect latest project and research SOTA

commands.name: /back
commands.description: Leave current project and return to Default workspace

commands.name: /compile
commands.description: Compile the project LaTeX source into PDF

commands.name: /sync
commands.args_usage:
/sync pull — download from Overleaf (default)
/sync push — upload local changes to Overleaf

commands.name: /pull-project
commands.description: Sync project with Overleaf and Git commit

commands.name: /task
commands.description: Enter interactive task mode for multi-step research goals
commands.args_usage:
/task <goal> — propose a plan, then /start to execute
/task --e2e <goal> — fully automatic: plan + execute + commit with no confirmation

commands.name: /start
commands.description: Approve the proposed task plan and begin execution (requires /task first)

commands.name: /done
commands.description: Exit task mode, generate a summary and restore normal mode (requires /task first)

commands.name: /list
commands.description: List local projects in the workspace

commands.name: /switch
commands.description: Switch to a project in the workspace
commands.args_usage:
/switch <project_name> — switch to project and create a new session
/switch <project_name> <MMDD_NN> — resume a specific session
